title: DevOps Engineer
description:
faro health aims to improve lives by helping life sciences companies answer complex clinical questions, simply, efficiently, and effectively. our software platform is used to orchestrate complex clinical development with a single source of truth. it brings words, data, and teams together, empowering researchers to design more intelligent trials, master complexity, and reach milestones faster.


the devops engineer is an important member of the engineering organization responsible for supporting reliable, scalable, and secure cloud infrastructure and deployment automation. this role partners closely with software engineering teams to improve ci/cd pipelines, manage infrastructure as code, and enhance the operational maturity of faro health’s cloud\-native saas platform.


this position is ideal for an engineer who enjoys solving infrastructure and automation challenges, improving developer productivity, and contributing to modern devops practices across azure, gcp, and aws environments.


duties and responsibilities* support the design, implementation, and maintenance of scalable cloud infrastructure and deployment pipelines.
* build and maintain ci/cd automation to improve software delivery velocity, consistency, and reliability.
* assist in managing infrastructure as code using terraform and related tooling.
* collaborate with software engineering teams to support deployment automation and cloud\-native application operations.
* monitor system reliability, availability, and performance, helping troubleshoot production and infrastructure issues.
* contribute to containerized application deployments using kubernetes and docker technologies.
* participate in infrastructure improvements focused on scalability, security, and operational efficiency.
* support platform observability through logging, monitoring, and alerting solutions.
* research and evaluate emerging devops tools and technologies to improve engineering workflows and platform capabilities.
* participate in on\-call rotations and incident response activities as needed.

**\*\*note:** candidates and recruiting agencies, please do not contact our employees regarding the position or your application status. doing so will automatically disqualify you from the position or working with us. only applications submitted through the designated link will be considered. **please do not spam our employees regarding the role or your application status.**

 **requirements**  

  

qualifications* 3\+ years of experience in devops, site reliability engineering, cloud infrastructure, or software engineering roles.
* experience supporting ci/cd pipelines and cloud\-based infrastructure in aws, azure, or google cloud environments.
* hands\-on experience deploying, managing, and troubleshooting containerized applications using kubernetes and related technologies such as docker and helm.
* familiarity with infrastructure as code concepts and tools such as terraform.
* experience working in agile engineering environments with cross\-functional collaboration.
* strong troubleshooting and problem\-solving skills with attention to operational excellence.
* ability to balance speed, reliability, and maintainability in infrastructure and automation solutions.
* comfortable learning new technologies and adapting to evolving business and technical requirements.


skills and competencies* cloud platform: experience with at least one major cloud provider such as aws, azure, or google cloud. familiarity with cloud networking, compute, storage, and security fundamentals. exposure to infrastructure as code practices using terraform or similar tools.
* containerization \& orchestration: experience with docker and kubernetes fundamentals. familiarity with helm and container deployment workflows is preferred.
* ci/cd \& automation: experience with ci/cd tools such as github actions, jenkins, or bitbucket pipelines. ability to support automated build, test, and deployment workflows.
* scripting \& development support: proficiency in scripting languages such as python, nodejs, bash, or powershell. familiarity supporting applications built with technologies such as node.js and python.
* monitoring \& reliability: exposure to monitoring, logging, and observability tools. understanding of system reliability, troubleshooting, and incident response practices.
* interest in applying ai\-assisted tooling and automation to devops workflows is a plus.
* strong communication and collaboration skills.
* self\-motivated and able to work independently while contributing effectively to a team environment.
* bachelor’s degree in computer science or related field, or equivalent practical experience.

  

**benefits**  

  

salary
salary range for this position is $145,000 to $175,000 per year.


individual pay is determined by work location and additional factors, including job\-related skills, experience, and relevant education or training


equity
in addition to this position’s salary (listed above), equity will be a major component of the total compensation for this position. we aim to offer higher\-than\-average equity compensation for a company of our size, and communicate equity amounts at the time of offer issuance.


benefits* health care plan (medical, dental \& vision)
* retirement plan (401k)
* life insurance (basic)
* short term and long term disability
* paid time off (flexible vacation policy; paid sick \& public holidays observed)
* training \& development reimbursement
* hybrid work environment
* peer\-to\-peer bonus program
* company/department outings and events
* stock option plan
* office on\-premises amenities; gym, restaurant tenant discount, padel nine

title: Azure App Modernization & DevOps Customer Engineer
description:
we have immediate opportunities for an azure platforms \- **app service; apim; microservices architecture** expert who lives and breathes **modern app development** in azure, cloud\-native architecture, and devops excellence to join our growing customer engineer (ce) team
this role centers on helping small, medium and enterprise customers build, deploy, and scale applications using **azure app services**, **api management**, **microservices**, and container platforms like **aks** and **azure container apps (aca)**.
you’ll also guide development teams in integrating ai\-driven productivity tools like **github copilot** while shaping secure and efficient ci/cd workflows in **github** and **azure devops** environments.
this is a highly strategic and technical role, where you’ll collaborate with customer leadership, architects, and developers to unlock business agility and innovation through modern cloud\-native practices.  

* guide customers through the design and deployment of **modern application architectures** on azure using **app services**, **apim**, and **microservices**.
* help teams adopt **devops best practices** with github and azure devops, optimizing pipelines for scalability, security, and automation.
* enable containerization strategies using **docker**, **azure kubernetes service (aks)**, and **azure container apps (aca)** for elastic, resilient services.
* integrate **github copilot** to accelerate development cycles, improve code quality, and drive ai\-assisted developer workflows.
* assist with **api strategy and management**, leveraging **azure api management (apim)** for secure and scalable exposure of services.
* provide architectural guidance and hands\-on support during cloud\-native transformations and app re\-platforming efforts.
* own technical governance across engagements, ensuring alignment with microsoft best practices and enterprise scalability needs.
* collaborate cross\-functionally to remove technical blockers and deliver on high\-impact modernization initiatives.

 **key skills \& technologies:*** **azure application services:** app services, apim, logic apps, azure functions (preferred).
* **architecture \& dev practices:** microservices, 12\-factor app principles, domain\-driven design (ddd), restful api design.
* **containers \& orchestration:** docker, aks (azure kubernetes service), aca (azure container apps), helm.
* **devops \& ci/cd:** github actions, azure devops, yaml pipelines, infrastructure as code (iac) with bicep/terraform.
* **ai\-enhanced dev:** github copilot integration, secure ai\-assisted development, and coding at scale.
* **security \& governance:** azure rbac, workload identity, managed identities, secrets management.

**ideal candidate will have:*** 10\- 15\+ years in software engineering or cloud architecture roles, with a focus on **azure platform, azure application services, architecture \& dev practices, devops \& ci/cd and security \& governance.**
* proven experience modernizing monolithic apps into **microservices** and/or container\-based architectures.
* hands\-on knowledge of **github**, **azure devops**, and ci/cd pipeline engineering.
* strong customer engagement skills, including the ability to present to both technical and business stakeholders.
* experience delivering cloud\-native solutions across the **entire app lifecycle**—from architecture and devops to scaling and support.

title: Software Development Engineer in Test (SDET)
description:
**position title: software development engineer in test (sdet)**  

**location: rockville, md (on\-site requirement)**  

**salary: $110,000\.00 \+**  

**position summary**
command cyber solutions is seeking a full\-time software development engineer in test (sdet) to support the development and quality assurance of enterprise\-grade .net core and azure\-based applications. this role is responsible for designing scalable automation frameworks, validating cloud\-native systems, and integrating automated testing into ci/cd pipelines. the ideal candidate is a strong software engineer with experience in automation, api/backend validation, cloud environments, and modern quality engineering practices. **essential duties \& responsibilities:*** design, develop, and maintain scalable automated testing frameworks and quality engineering infrastructure.
* create automated ui, api, integration, regression, and end\-to\-end tests.
* integrate automated testing into ci/cd deployment pipelines.
* collaborate with software engineers, product owners, and technical teams throughout the development lifecycle.
* participate in sprint planning, code reviews, and technical design discussions with a quality\-first mindset.
* troubleshoot defects, perform root cause analysis, and support resolution efforts.
* validate apis, backend services, authentication flows, data integrity, and cloud\-based system integrations.
* build reusable testing utilities, mocks, fixtures, and automation tooling.
* support performance, reliability, security, and scalability testing initiatives.
* continuously improve automation coverage, testing processes, and engineering best practices.

 **education, certification \& experience requirements:****education required:*** bachelor’s degree in computer science, quality engineering, or test automation.

**certifications required:*** ability to pass federal and local background investigations.

**experience required:*** 3\+ years of hands\-on experience in software engineering, quality engineering, or test automation.
* strong programming experience with c\#, .net core/.net, typescript, or javascript.
* experience building and maintaining automated test frameworks using playwright, selenium, xunit, nunit, or similar tools.
* experience testing web applications, rest apis, distributed systems, and azure\-hosted applications.
* experience integrating automated testing into ci/cd pipelines using azure devops, github actions, jenkins, or similar platforms.
* experience with git workflows, sql/database validation, and backend testing.
* strong debugging, analytical, and root cause analysis skills.
* understanding of sdlc, agile methodologies, and modern quality engineering practices.
* ability to perform strong targeted manual exploratory and edge\-case testing when needed.
* experience with azure services including app services, azure functions, azure sql, service bus, application insights, and azure monitor.
* familiarity with microsoft entra id (azure ad), oauth, oidc, and rbac.
* experience with docker, kubernetes, or containerized environments.
* experience with performance, load, or reliability testing.
* experience testing ai\-enabled or machine learning powered applications.
* familiarity with regulated or compliance driven environments (fedramp, nist, etc.)

 **knowledge, skills \& abilities:****knowledge:*** comprehensive knowledge of sdlc methodologies, automated test framework design patterns, and quality engineering principles applicable to enterprise grade .net core, azure hosted, and containerized application environments.
* strong understanding of federal compliance frameworks including nist and fedramp requirements as they apply to software testing and validation within usda cloud environments.

**skills:*** advanced proficiency in designing and maintaining automated test frameworks using playwright, selenium, xunit, and nunit, with demonstrated experience integrating automated testing into ci/cd pipelines via azure devops, github actions, or jenkins.
* proficient in debugging, root cause analysis, and defect resolution across distributed systems, including rest api validation, microsoft entra id authentication flows, and database integrity testing using azure app services, azure functions, and service bus.

**abilities:*** ability to operate independently within agile sprint cycles, contribute to code reviews and technical design discussions with a quality\-first mindset, and collaborate effectively with software engineers, product owners, and government stakeholders.
* ability to rapidly adapt to emerging technologies and ai\-enabled application architectures while maintaining a security first approach across multi\-cloud and containerized federal environments.

 **why join command cyber solutions:**
we recognize that our success begins with our people. we are dedicated to fostering a professional, collaborative, and growth\-oriented environment where employees are empowered to excel and advance their careers, ccs offers opportunities to contribute to high\-impact federal initiatives, supported by robust professional development programs, competitive compensation, comprehensive benefits, and flexible work arrangements. we prioritize investing in our workforce, ensuring each team member has the resources, support, and career pathways to achieve long\-term success while delivering meaningful results for our clients.  

**culture:**
at ccs, you’ll be a part of a team that genuinely supports one another and where leadership is invested in the well\-being and success of every employee. we foster a work culture where people are valued for who they are, not just what they do, and where your career goals are taken seriously. you’ll be encouraged to grow through mentorship, hands\-on experience, and access to continued learning opportunities that align with your aspirations. whether you’re looking to deepen your expertise, earn new certifications, or take on leadership roles, ccs provides the environment and support to help you get there. leadership is approachable, collaboration is natural, and success is shared. at ccs, you’re not just joining a company; you’re joining a community committed to your growth and success.  

**benefits:**
we offer a comprehensive benefits package designed to support the health, financial security, and overall well\-being of our employees and their families. our offerings include medical and prescription drug plans, dental coverage, group life insurance, and options for supplemental life insurance to provide additional protection. we also provide short\-term and long\-term disability insurance, flexible spending accounts, and employee assistance programs to help employees manage personal and professional needs. our package also includes identity theft protection and a competitive 401(k) retirement savings plan with company contributions, giving employees valuable resources to protect their future and achieve long\-term financial goals.  

**eeo statement:**
command cyber solutions, llc is an equal opportunity employer. command cyber solutions, llc does not discriminate in employment opportunities or practices on the basis of race, color, religion, sex, national origin, age, disability, marital status or any other characteristic protected by law.  

**about potawatomi federal solutions:**  

potawatomi federal solutions is a federal government contractor who provides essential services and administrative support to potawatomi business development corporations’ family of industry\-leading federal government contracting subsidiaries. we are 100% tribally owned small business of the forest county potawatomi community of wisconsin. in 2007, we launched with one mission in mind: to create a profitable tribal enterprise to allow us to invest in the health, wellness, education, environment and future of our people for generations to come. what fuels your fire? we invite you to find out by exploring our career opportunities and joining our dynamic team of innovative professionals!

title: Senior Engineer
description:
**group overview**

the tp icap group is a world leading provider of market infrastructure.  



  

our purpose is to provide clients with access to global financial and commodities markets, improving price discovery, liquidity, and distribution of data, through responsible and innovative solutions.  



  

through our people and technology, we connect clients to superior liquidity and data solutions.  



  

the group is home to a stable of premium brands. collectively, tp icap is the largest interdealer broker in the world by revenue, the number one energy \& commodities broker in the world, the world’s leading provider of otc data, and an award winning all\-to\-all trading platform.  



  

founded in london in 1866, the group operates from more than 60 offices in 27 countries. we are 5,200 people strong. we work as one to achieve our vision of being the world’s most trusted, innovative, liquidity and data solutions specialist.  



  

**role overview**

the senior engineer plays a critical role in designing and delivering high\-quality technical solutions that align with business objectives. this position requires strong technical expertise, leadership in engineering practices, and the ability to collaborate across teams. the role involves driving innovation, mentoring junior engineers, and ensuring adherence to architectural standards and security requirements.


**role responsibilities**

* design, develop, and maintain scalable software solutions aligned with technical strategy.
* collaborate with architects and principal engineers to ensure best practices.
* own key features from design through delivery, ensuring timely and high\-quality outcomes.
* mentor and support junior engineers, fostering technical excellence.
* partner with qa teams to ensure robust testing and quality assurance.
* implement and promote engineering best practices, including code reviews and ci/cd.
* engage in continuous improvement by experimenting with new technologies.
* communicate effectively on progress, risks, and impediments to stakeholders.
* contribute to architectural discussions and influence technical decisions.
* ensure compliance with security, risk management, and regulatory standards.
* communicate technical details related to proprietary api with external clients.
* support external clients building applications with our proprietary api providing technical details as well as software samples.
* build, maintain and update proprietary api for variety of programming languages (e.g. c\#, c\+\+ and java) for linux and windows operating systems.

**experience / competences**

essential


* degree in computer science or equivalent experience.
* proven experience with one or more programming languages (e.g., c\#, java, c\+\+).
* solid experience with developing applications on unix/linux and windows.
* microsoft visual studio office application development experience (e.g. user defined functions and vsto development).
* experience with relational and non\-relational databases (oracle, mongodb).
* experience with messaging technologies (e.g. solace, rabbitmq, kafka).
* exposure to real\-time event processing (e.g. messaging, signals, db events).
* experience using feature and bug tracking tools (e.g. jira).
* solid understanding of software design principles and secure coding practices.
* strong problem\-solving skills and ability to work collaboratively in agile teams.
* excellent communication and attention to detail.

  

desired


* experience with microservices architecture and serverless technologies.
* exposure to financial markets or trading systems.
* experience with python.
* knowledge of cloud platforms and containerization (e.g., aws, docker).
* experience with automated testing frameworks (tdd, bdd).
* experience with messaging technologies (e.g. solace, google protocol buffers).
* understanding of performance optimization and low\-latency systems.
* experience working with modern ai\-assisted development tools (e.g., kiro, amazon q, or similar) to improve developer productivity.
* familiarity with ci/cd pipelines and git\-based source control.

**role band \& level**

* manager, 6

**salary**

* $136,000 to $175,000
* *commensurate with experience*

*\#li\-aso*

**not the perfect fit?**

concerned that you may not meet the criteria precisely? at tp icap, we wholeheartedly believe in fostering inclusivity and cultivating a work environment where everyone can flourish, regardless of your personal or professional background. if you are enthusiastic about this role but find that your experience doesn't align perfectly with every aspect of the job description, we strongly encourage you to apply. you may be the ideal candidate for this position or another opportunity within our organisation. our dedicated talent acquisition team is here to assist you in recognising how your unique skills and abilities can be a valuable contribution. don't hesitate to take the leap and explore the possibilities. your potential is what truly matters to us.


**company statement**

we know that the best innovation happens when diverse people with different perspectives and skills work together in an inclusive atmosphere. that's why we're building a culture where everyone plays a part in making people feel welcome, ready and willing to contribute. tp icap accord \- our employee network \- is a central to this. as well as representing specific groups, tp icap accord helps increase awareness, collaboration, shares best practice, and holds our firm to account for driving continuous cultural improvement.


**location**

usa \- 200 vesey street \- new york, ny

title: Sr. Full Stack Software Engineer
description:
**advancedmd**



advancedmd is a unified cloud suite of medical office software hosted on amazon web services/aws including practice management, electronic health records, and patient engagement, and offers managed medical billing services for independent practices. advancedmd serves an expansive national footprint of 65,000 practitioners across 14,000 practices and 900 independent medical billing companies. 8\.8m insurance claims are processed every month on the advancedmd billing platform!

 **role summary**



are you an experienced full stack engineer who thrives on building high\-performance web applications that make a real impact in healthcare? advancedmd is seeking a passionate and collaborative **senior software engineer – full stack** to help shape the future of patient engagement and medical practice software.



you'll help design and implement cloud\-based solutions that power the future of medical practice software — moving at an extremely high pace to simplify, modernize, and improve the product that thousands of healthcare providers depend on daily. in this role, you will drive the reduction of workflow complexity: eliminating legacy patterns, modernizing the ui, and building a cleaner, faster experience for our clients. you know how to leverage ai tools effectively to accelerate development and ship with confidence. you'll lead a team of offshore developers and qe engineers in a fast\-paced, agile environment — and work directly with the vp of engineering and vp of product on design, planning, and roadmap execution.



this is an exciting opportunity to join a healthcare technology leader where your technical expertise, creativity, and leadership will directly impact the experience of medical practitioners and patients nationwide. if you enjoy solving complex problems, collaborating across teams, and continuously learning new technologies, we'd love to meet you.

  


**essential job duties:**


* design, develop, and maintain applications in accordance with project requirements using a kanban\-based delivery model
* modernize and simplify legacy applications — reducing complexity and accelerating delivery through thoughtful refactoring and modern patterns
* drive migrations and front\-end modernization efforts across the platform
* build and maintain angular front\-end applications with solid knowledge of vanilla javascript, plain html, and css — including legacy integration patterns
* leverage ai tools to enhance development velocity and support integration of ai\-driven features into existing products
* build and contribute to ai\-powered capabilities including conversational chatbot interfaces and ai\-driven task engine frameworks
* build and optimize restful apis and enterprise\-grade solutions with a focus on performance, scalability, and reliability
* review requirements and changes to ensure code quality, maintainability, and best practices are followed
* drive process improvements in ai\-driven development workflows and ci/cd pipelines — identifying opportunities where ai tooling can further streamline delivery
* troubleshoot, debug, and resolve application performance, observability, and scalability challenges
* continuously learn and apply new tools, frameworks, and technologies to enhance development practices
* lead and mentor a team of offshore developers and qe engineers, and work directly with the vp of engineering and vp of product on design, planning, and roadmap execution

  


**what you'll need to get the job done**:


* bachelor's degree in computer science, information technology, business / management information systems, or related field (experience may be considered in lieu of degree)
* minimum of 7 years of professional web development experience
* 3\+ years of enterprise development experience, including ci/cd, multitenant saas, performance, scalability, observability, and ownership
* strong proficiency in angular, with solid knowledge of vanilla javascript, plain html, and css
* comfortable using ai coding tools (such as claude code, github copilot, or similar) to accelerate day\-to\-day engineering work
* proven experience building restful services
* experience with sql/t\-sql and nosql databases
* cloud experience (aws preferred)
* demonstrated ability to lead offshore development and qa teams
* strong technical problem\-solving and communication skills
* proven experience delivering in a kanban or continuous\-flow environment

  


**what will make us love you**


* hands\-on experience with claude code or similar ai\-assisted development environments
* experience with angularjs\-to\-angular migrations or large\-scale front\-end modernization
* familiarity with micro\-frontend architectures
* experience building chatbot or conversational ui components and integrating ai\-driven workflow engines
* experience building or integrating ai\-powered features into production applications — using frameworks such as langchain, openai api, or similar
* understanding of prompt engineering and how to integrate llms sensibly into enterprise workflows
* experience with web security best practices
* proficiency with git and ci/cd practices
* experience with c\#, azure devops, and visual studio code

  


**life at advancedmd: the burst way to be \- learn more about our company culture.**


* **be intentional** – we act with clarity, focus, and purpose in everything we do.
* **urgency with purpose** – we move fast on what matters and deliver meaningful results.
* **respect always** – we lead with integrity, value every voice, and build each other up.
* **strive for greatness** – we set high standards, embrace innovation, and never stop improving.
* **together with clients** – we collaborate deeply, build trusted partnerships, and win as one team.

  

**about advancedmd**


advancedmd, now part of the francisco partners ("fp") portfolio, revolutionized medical office software in 1999 with the introduction of the industry's first true cloud solution. today, the company continues to lead healthtech innovation with a complete cloud suite of smart applications that work in unison, accelerating collaborative workflow for every role of the practice. with advancedmd, medical office staff are empowered to thrive in the online age of healthcare and value\-based reimbursement with essential clinical, financial, patient engagement and reputation management applications that are unified and available anytime, anywhere on any device. advancedmd strives to be the technology heartbeat of healthcare for providers, patients, and payors for a healthier world. for more information on advancedmd, please visit www.advancedmd.com.

  





**work environment**


* hybrid office arrangement in the south jordan, utah office location. in office training, with opportunity to work up to a flexible hybrid format. remote work is contingent upon individual role, team structure and alignment to role kpis.

  


**what we offer**:

  




* competitive compensation and total rewards benefits
* comprehensive health, dental, and vision insurance
* 401(k) with generous company match
* paid time off and holidays
* hybrid and remote work opportunities
* career growth and development support
* collaborative, team\-oriented culture

  





privacy notices for team members and job applicants

* hybrid office arrangement in the south jordan, utah office location. in office training, with opportunity to work up to a flexible hybrid format. remote work is contingent upon individual role, team structure and alignment to role kpis.

  


**what we offer**:

  




* competitive compensation and total rewards benefits
* comprehensive health, dental, and vision insurance
* 401(k) with generous company match
* paid time off and holidays
* hybrid and remote work opportunities
* career growth and development support
* collaborative, team\-oriented culture

title: Software Development Engineer in Test (SDET)
description:
**position title: software development engineer in test (sdet)**

**location: rockville, md (on\-site requirement)**

**salary: $110,000\.00 \+**

 **position summary**


command cyber solutions is seeking a full\-time software development engineer in test (sdet) to support the development and quality assurance of enterprise\-grade .net core and azure\-based applications. this role is responsible for designing scalable automation frameworks, validating cloud\-native systems, and integrating automated testing into ci/cd pipelines. the ideal candidate is a strong software engineer with experience in automation, api/backend validation, cloud environments, and modern quality engineering practices.

 **essential duties \& responsibilities:**

* design, develop, and maintain scalable automated testing frameworks and quality engineering infrastructure.
* create automated ui, api, integration, regression, and end\-to\-end tests.
* integrate automated testing into ci/cd deployment pipelines.
* collaborate with software engineers, product owners, and technical teams throughout the development lifecycle.
* participate in sprint planning, code reviews, and technical design discussions with a quality\-first mindset.
* troubleshoot defects, perform root cause analysis, and support resolution efforts.
* validate apis, backend services, authentication flows, data integrity, and cloud\-based system integrations.
* build reusable testing utilities, mocks, fixtures, and automation tooling.
* support performance, reliability, security, and scalability testing initiatives.
* continuously improve automation coverage, testing processes, and engineering best practices.

 **education, certification \& experience requirements:**

**education required:**

* bachelor’s degree in computer science, quality engineering, or test automation.

 **certifications required:**

* ability to pass federal and local background investigations.

 **experience required:**

* 3\+ years of hands\-on experience in software engineering, quality engineering, or test automation.
* strong programming experience with c\#, .net core/.net, typescript, or javascript.
* experience building and maintaining automated test frameworks using playwright, selenium, xunit, nunit, or similar tools.
* experience testing web applications, rest apis, distributed systems, and azure\-hosted applications.
* experience integrating automated testing into ci/cd pipelines using azure devops, github actions, jenkins, or similar platforms.
* experience with git workflows, sql/database validation, and backend testing.
* strong debugging, analytical, and root cause analysis skills.
* understanding of sdlc, agile methodologies, and modern quality engineering practices.
* ability to perform strong targeted manual exploratory and edge\-case testing when needed.
* experience with azure services including app services, azure functions, azure sql, service bus, application insights, and azure monitor.
* familiarity with microsoft entra id (azure ad), oauth, oidc, and rbac.
* experience with docker, kubernetes, or containerized environments.
* experience with performance, load, or reliability testing.
* experience testing ai\-enabled or machine learning powered applications.
* familiarity with regulated or compliance driven environments (fedramp, nist, etc.)

 **knowledge, skills \& abilities:**

**knowledge:**

* comprehensive knowledge of sdlc methodologies, automated test framework design patterns, and quality engineering principles applicable to enterprise grade .net core, azure hosted, and containerized application environments.
* strong understanding of federal compliance frameworks including nist and fedramp requirements as they apply to software testing and validation within usda cloud environments.

 **skills:**

* advanced proficiency in designing and maintaining automated test frameworks using playwright, selenium, xunit, and nunit, with demonstrated experience integrating automated testing into ci/cd pipelines via azure devops, github actions, or jenkins.
* proficient in debugging, root cause analysis, and defect resolution across distributed systems, including rest api validation, microsoft entra id authentication flows, and database integrity testing using azure app services, azure functions, and service bus.

 **abilities:**

* ability to operate independently within agile sprint cycles, contribute to code reviews and technical design discussions with a quality\-first mindset, and collaborate effectively with software engineers, product owners, and government stakeholders.
* ability to rapidly adapt to emerging technologies and ai\-enabled application architectures while maintaining a security first approach across multi\-cloud and containerized federal environments.

 **why join command cyber solutions:**


we recognize that our success begins with our people. we are dedicated to fostering a professional, collaborative, and growth\-oriented environment where employees are empowered to excel and advance their careers, ccs offers opportunities to contribute to high\-impact federal initiatives, supported by robust professional development programs, competitive compensation, comprehensive benefits, and flexible work arrangements. we prioritize investing in our workforce, ensuring each team member has the resources, support, and career pathways to achieve long\-term success while delivering meaningful results for our clients.

**culture:**


at ccs, you’ll be a part of a team that genuinely supports one another and where leadership is invested in the well\-being and success of every employee. we foster a work culture where people are valued for who they are, not just what they do, and where your career goals are taken seriously. you’ll be encouraged to grow through mentorship, hands\-on experience, and access to continued learning opportunities that align with your aspirations. whether you’re looking to deepen your expertise, earn new certifications, or take on leadership roles, ccs provides the environment and support to help you get there. leadership is approachable, collaboration is natural, and success is shared. at ccs, you’re not just joining a company; you’re joining a community committed to your growth and success.

**benefits:**


we offer a comprehensive benefits package designed to support the health, financial security, and overall well\-being of our employees and their families. our offerings include medical and prescription drug plans, dental coverage, group life insurance, and options for supplemental life insurance to provide additional protection. we also provide short\-term and long\-term disability insurance, flexible spending accounts, and employee assistance programs to help employees manage personal and professional needs. our package also includes identity theft protection and a competitive 401(k) retirement savings plan with company contributions, giving employees valuable resources to protect their future and achieve long\-term financial goals.

**eeo statement:**


command cyber solutions, llc is an equal opportunity employer. command cyber solutions, llc does not discriminate in employment opportunities or practices on the basis of race, color, religion, sex, national origin, age, disability, marital status or any other characteristic protected by law.

title: Full-Stack Engineer
description:
**location**: los angeles, ca (on\-site)

  

our mission is to promote american values through the creative use of digital media, technology and edu\-tainment. we're proud to be voted among the “best place to work in los angeles” by the la business journal 4 years in a row.


we are seeking a highly skilled full stack engineer who is comfortable working across both front\-end and back\-end systems. this role will be responsible for designing and developing scalable web architecture, ensuring application performance and responsiveness, and collaborating cross\-functionally to deliver high\-quality products.


**duties and responsibilities**:


* lead the full software development lifecycle from concept to deployment
* maintain, optimize, and upgrade production systems
* design, build, test, and deploy scalable applications
* own end\-to\-end development of features and services
* contribute to and help improve automated testing processes
* review, modify, and enhance existing codebases
* architect and develop front\-end user experiences and interactions
* build and maintain back\-end services and apis
* ensure cross\-platform optimization and mobile responsiveness
* collaborate with design and product teams to deliver intuitive user experiences
* balance technical requirements with user needs
* stay current with emerging technologies and best practices


**successful candidates will possess**:


* 5\+ years of relevant full stack development experience
* strong expertise in react and next.js (required)
* strong familiarity and expertise with vercel
* ability to use modern (ai\-powered) development tools but also has not forgotten how to apply a critical eye to any piece of code in the codebase and also apply system\-level thinking.
* experience with react native is a plus
* deep knowledge of front\-end technologies, including javascript, html5, css3, and modern libraries/frameworks (primarily react and next.js; familiarity with angular or jquery is a plus)
* experience working in cloud\-based environments such as vercel, aws, planetscale, or mongodb atlas; familiarity with similar paas tools is good
* strong organizational skills with attention to documentation and detail
* experience with databases such as mysql, postgres, and mongodb
* strong verbal and written communication skills
* proven problem\-solving ability and attention to detail
* experience with server\-side programming languages such as rust, python, or go is a plus
* familiarity with database systems and caching technologies such as redis, memcached, or varnish
* basic understanding of ui/ux principles and prototyping
* experience working with nginx or apache servers and linux environments, with the ability to troubleshoot performance issues
* ability to think through and architect systems, then execute on building them end\-to\-end


**how to apply**: first review our website at www.prageru.com (http://www.prageru.com/). read our annual report here (https://downloads.ctfassets.net/qnesrjodfi80/1e7ztqeyz7bk92lzbkggxj/50f1cba968c3b5dd9ebe125b2a025141/prageruannualreport\_digital\_2025\.pdf). submit a resume and cover letter. in your cover letter, include a section explaining how your values align with ours, and why you would want to specifically work at prageru.


**what we do**: we promote american values through educational videos for people of all ages. people come to prageru for a variety of reasons, but they all have one thing in common: they want to grow—intellectually, spiritually, emotionally, and physically. to learn more about prageru, visit http://prageru.com.


**salary range**: the salary target for this role is $140,000 \- $160,000\+. final offer amounts depend on multiple factors including candidate experience and expertise, and most recent market data. this position is eligible for an annual bonus based on personal and company performance, in addition to our robust benefits package.


we are an equal opportunity employer and all qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, gender identity, disability, protected veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law.


an error page could appear for several reasons. if a technical issue occurs while applying, we suggest double checking a few things. click here for additional information (https://drive.google.com/file/d/1futleicec3lq\_dievkmrnfisia69g2fx/view?usp\=sharing).


*please note that we constantly have ideas and concepts pitched to us which we appreciate. most ideas and concepts are not protectable and are freely available for the public and prageru to use or modify and use. from time to time where they are not, you agree that by presenting these ideas and concept, and in consideration of prageru reviewing these ideas and concepts, you hereby grant to prageru an irrevocable, worldwide, royalty\-free and non\-exclusive license to use, modify and exploit for any purpose any ideas and concepts and any expressions of those ideas and concepts. nothing herein precludes you from using any ideas or concepts presented.*

title: Computer Scientist / Software Developer
description:
**job title: computer scientist / software developer – auburn, al**

**company overview**: integrated solutions for systems (is4s) is a fast\-growing small business at the forefront of developing innovative solutions for the warfighter. we use applied research and development combined with novel systems integration to enhance capabilities of our armed forces.

**position:** computer scientist / software developer

**location:** auburn, al or aberdeen, md

**job type:** full\-time

**job description:** is4s is seeking a computer scientist / software developer in auburn, al or aberdeen, md. join a team that is expanding the capabilities for the us armed forces through a multi\-disciplinary approach to overcome real\-world problems and limitations impacting today’s soldier.


efforts will support development of command and control systems, along with their integration, testing, and deployment. activities may include

* working within a team structure to plan and architect user\-facing functions and automations
* creating algorithms in back\-end processors utilizing relational databases to develop associations, conduct analyses
* incorporating cyber best practices in the foundational software design and in its development
* monitoring for cves and providing timely mitigations
* engaging warfighters and smes to gather and understand feedback and needs
* travel to support integration, demonstration, and user engagement


the challenges facing our nation are constantly evolving. therefore, we are looking for self\-driven team members willing and able to constantly learn, adapt, and find ways to develop and integrate solutions. selected applicants will be expected to gain familiarity with the underlying domain (e.g., ew, fires, pnt) and its role in the larger system of systems to incorporate warfighter needs throughout the solution. they will be given freedom to solve problems and develop solutions with the expectation of owning their tasks and responsibilities. they will also integrate into an existing team that provides support and to ensure designs and solutions conform to and enhance the end product.

 **required abilities, experience, and skills:**

* bachelor’s degree or higher in engineering, computer science, or related technical field (for full\-time applicants)
* in pursuit of a bachelor’s degree or higher in engineering, computer science, or related technical field (for part\-time applicants)
* ability to comprehend complex systems and identify interconnections and functions of both internal and external systems/subsystems/services
* knowledge of programming languages and software design to support development and integration of system drivers and adapters needed to communicate across systems
* experience with programming languages, (e.g., go, c\+\+), build tools, and ides (e.g., jetbrains suite, vscode)
* ability to decompose engineering documentation to identify and explain needed tasks
* ability to work independently, take initiative, and manage tasks with minimal direction
* must be able to travel to support customer engagements, integration and testing in live environments, occasionally working non\-standard hours to match exercise schedules
* must be able to lift and carry computing and networking equipment in support of transit and installation
* possess strong written and verbal communication skills
* us citizenship is required

 **desired experience and skills:**

* understanding of containerization, management, and software deployment (especially using docker, kubernetes, and helm)
* understanding of enterprise application development
* understanding of hardware and software virtualization
* experience with modern service development practices, including swagger/openapi code generation, protocol buffers (protobuf), and grpc service development.
* experience designing and optimizing data solutions, including etl pipelines, relational databases such as postgresql, and nosql technologies such as mongodb and elasticsearch.
* familiarity with devsecops and infrastructure automation tools, including helm, ci/cd pipelines such as jenkins, gitlab ci, or argocd, infrastructure as code tools such as ansible and terraform, and working in air\-gapped or classified environments with iron bank hardened container images.
* understanding of tactical networks, including enterprise, satellite, terrestrial, and mobile, ad hoc networks (manets)
* familiarity with army compute systems and compute environments
* familiarity with standard devsecops practices and platforms (e.g., git, ci/cd pipelines, vulnerability scanning, etc.)
* experience with mission command or c2 systems, especially those dealing with fires and electromagnetic warfare

 **benefits summary:**

* competitive salary with comprehensive health and wellness benefits
* dynamic and collaborative work environment
* employee ownership
* medical, dental, and vision care plans
* paid time\-off and parental leave programs
* group term life insurance
* 401(k) retirement plan
* tuition assistance, training, and education development offerings

title: Engineering Associate - Applications, Data & AI
description:
**about this role:**  

  

wells fargo is seeking an engineering associate within chief operating office (coo) technology. coo technology provides technology services that support critical enterprise functions including operations, control management, strategic execution, business continuity and resiliency, data solutions, customer experience, regulatory relations, and enterprise shared services. this organization delivers and manages application portfolios and technology solutions that drive modernization, optimize processes, and enhance operational efficiency across the company.  

  

in this role, you will contribute to the development, testing, and support of technology solutions that enable these business functions. you will work in a collaborative, agile environment alongside product, infrastructure, security, and data teams to support scalable, secure, and resilient systems.  

  

this position is ideal for early\-career engineers who are interested in building foundational experience in enterprise technology, data platforms, and modern engineering practices. you will gain hands\-on experience working with programming languages such as python, cloud\-based technologies, and ai\-assisted tools while supporting real\-world business and operational systems in a highly regulated environment.  

  

you will also participate in the career opportunities in development and engineering (code) program . the code program is a two\-year engineering development experience designed for individuals who are early in their technical careers. the program is intended for candidates with approximately 6 months to 2 years of hands\-on engineering experience.  

  

the code program offers meaningful, real\-world work combined with structured professional development, mentorship, and exposure to a broad range of technologies across the enterprise. upon successful completion of the program, participants are eligible for promotion and continued employment, subject to business needs and performance expectations.  

  

code provides:* immersive onboarding and foundational technical training
* a supportive cohort experience of peers starting their tech careers
* dedicated mentors and program managers who guide your development
* professional development, career coaching, and workshops


wells fargo only considers candidates who are presently authorized to work for any employer in the united states and who do not require work visa sponsorship now or in the future in order to retain their authorization to work in the united states.  

  

**in this role, you will:*** develop, test, and support applications and services using programming languages such as python, java, or other object\-oriented languages, applying foundational knowledge of data structures and algorithms
* support data processing and engineering activities, including working with sql, etl/elt pipelines, and distributed data frameworks to enable data\-driven solutions
* contribute to building and enhancing web\-based applications using modern javascript frameworks (e.g., react, angular) and integrating them with backend services
* work with cloud platforms and container\-based technologies (e.g., kubernetes, container orchestration tools) to support scalable and resilient application deployments
* apply systems design and testing principles to support development, debugging, and validation of application functionality
* collaborate with cross\-functional teams including product, infrastructure, security, and data teams to deliver solutions aligned with enterprise standards
* use ai\-enabled tools and techniques (e.g., prompt engineering, retrieval\-augmented generation (rag), and developer copilots) to improve productivity and support solution development
* analyze problems, identify patterns, and implement solutions that improve performance, reliability, and operational efficiency
* support security, privacy, and risk requirements by adhering to enterprise policies and contributing to secure design and development practices
* communicate technical concepts clearly to both technical and non\-technical stakeholders and contribute to documentation and knowledge sharing

**required qualifications:**  

  

6\+ months of technology engineering and solutions experience, or equivalent demonstrated through one or a combination of the following: work experience, training, military experience, education  

  

**desired qualifications:*** 6\+ months of hands\-on programming experience, including python, java, or other object\-oriented languages, with understanding of data structures, algorithms, and basic systems design
* 6\+ months of experience with data processing and engineering concepts, including sql, etl/elt pipelines, and exposure to large\-scale or distributed data processing frameworks (e.g., spark)
* 6\+ months of hands\-on experience developing web applications, including javascript frameworks such as react or angular and integrating front\-end and backend systems
* practical experience applying software development lifecycle (sdlc) practices, including coding, testing, debugging, and working in agile environments using tools such as jira
* experience using ai\-enabled tools and concepts, including developer copilots, prompt engineering, or exposure to generative ai use cases (e.g., rag concepts)
* experience with data engineering and data processing, including sql, etl/elt workflows, and exposure to large\-scale or distributed data concepts (e.g., spark or similar frameworks)
* experience working with cloud platforms and container\-based technologies, including exposure to cloud environments and tools such as kubernetes or docker for deploying or supporting applications
* foundational understanding of security, privacy, and risk principles, including exposure to secure development practices or enterprise governance concepts
* demonstrated ability to communicate technical concepts clearly and collaborate effectively with cross\-functional teams (product, infrastructure, security, data)
* strong problem\-solving, critical thinking, and continuous learning mindset, with the ability to quickly adapt to new technologies and tools
* proficiency in microsoft office tools such as excel and word, managing email and calendars in outlook, and building presentations in powerpoint.
* experience communicating technical issues or access\-related concerns across technical and non\-technical teams.
* demonstrated ability to manage multiple tasks simultaneously and meet deadlines in academic or professional settings.
* bachelor's in computer science or related field preferred but not required.

**job expectations:*** the selected candidate for this role must be able to begin employment by july 12, 2026, in a full\-time capacity.
* this position is required to work from the designated posted office location and must be able to meet all expectations of the current hybrid work schedule, including regular in\-office attendance as defined by the team and program requirements.
* actively engage in the two\-year code program, including participation in training, mentorship, networking events, and career development activities.
* relocation assistance is not provided for this role.
* this position is not eligible for visa sponsorship.

**benefits**  

  

wells fargo provides eligible employees with a comprehensive set of benefits, many of which are listed below. visit benefits \- wells fargo jobs for an overview of the following benefit plans and programs offered to employees.* health benefits
* 401(k) plan
* paid time off
* disability benefits
* life insurance, critical illness insurance, and accident insurance
* parental leave
* critical caregiving leave
* discounts and savings
* commuter benefits
* tuition reimbursement
* scholarships for dependent children
* adoption reimbursement

**posting end date:**
  

21 may 2026  

**\*job posting may come down early due to volume of applicants.**
  

  

**we value equal opportunity**  

  

wells fargo is an equal opportunity employer. all qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability, status as a protected veteran, or any other legally protected characteristic.  

  

employees support our focus on building strong customer relationships balanced with a strong risk mitigating and compliance\-driven culture which firmly establishes those disciplines as critical to the success of our customers and company. they are accountable for execution of all applicable risk programs (credit, market, financial crimes, operational, regulatory compliance), which includes effectively following and adhering to applicable wells fargo policies and procedures, appropriately fulfilling risk and compliance obligations, timely and effective escalation and remediation of issues, and making sound risk decisions. there is emphasis on proactive monitoring, governance, risk identification and escalation, as well as making sound risk decisions commensurate with the business unit's risk appetite and all risk and compliance program requirements.  

  

candidates applying to job openings posted in canada: applications for employment are encouraged from all qualified candidates, including women, persons with disabilities, aboriginal peoples and visible minorities. accommodation for applicants with disabilities is available upon request in connection with the recruitment process.  

  

**applicants with disabilities**  

  

to request a medical accommodation during the application or interview process, visit disability inclusion at wells fargo .  

  

**drug and alcohol policy**  

  

wells fargo maintains a drug free workplace. please see our drug and alcohol policy to learn more.  

  

**wells fargo recruitment and hiring requirements:**  

  

a. third\-party recordings are prohibited unless authorized by wells fargo.  

  

b. wells fargo requires you to directly represent your own experiences during the recruiting and hiring process.

title: AI Solutions Engineer
description:
job summary :

the ai engineer will design, develop, and implement ai\-powered solutions and software applications that  

leverage machine learning, large language models, and intelligent automation to solve business challenges  

across tdindustries' construction, facilities, and building services operations. this role partners with business  

stakeholders to identify ai opportunities, builds proof\-of\-concept solutions, and delivers production\-ready  

applications that integrate with enterprise platforms. the position serves as a technical resource on ai/ml best  

practices, responsible ai governance, and emerging technologies.
company overview:

tdindustries is an employee\-owned company in the mechanical construction, operations, and maintenance  

industry headquartered in dallas, texas. with approximately 3,100 employee\-partners across six business units,  

tdindustries delivers mechanical construction, building services, facilities management, and manufacturing  

solutions. the technology services team drives innovation through enterprise platforms, digital products, and  

emerging technologies including artificial intelligence.
essential duties:
* design and develop ai\-powered applications using large language models (llms), including integration with azure openai, anthropic claude, and other foundation model providers
* build ai agents and agentic ai solutions that autonomously execute multi\-step workflows, make decisions, and integrate with enterprise systems
* leverage azure ai foundry and microsoft copilot studio to develop, deploy, and manage ai solutions and custom copilots across the organization
* implement retrieval\-augmented generation (rag) solutions, vector databases, and semantic search capabilities to enable intelligent document processing and knowledge retrieval
* develop and optimize prompts, prompt chains, and agentic workflows for production ai applications
* build machine learning pipelines for predictive analytics, anomaly detection, and classification use cases relevant to construction and facilities operations
* develop full\-stack applications using modern frameworks including python, typescript/javascript, react, node.js, etc
* design and implement restful apis and microservices architectures for ai model serving and application integration
* embed ai\-driven ci/cd and agile approaches in end\-to\-end development, leveraging intelligent automation for code review, testing, deployment, and sprint planning
* integrate ai capabilities with enterprise platforms, including microsoft dynamics 365, power platform, and azure cloud services
* implement ci/cd pipelines, automated testing, and mlops practices for reliable deployment of ai solutions
* partner with business stakeholders to identify ai opportunities, translate requirements into technical solutions, and deliver proof\-of\-concept demonstrations
* evaluate emerging ai technologies, tools, and frameworks; provide recommendations for adoption
* support ai governance initiatives including responsible ai policies, data ethics guidelines, and model evaluation frameworks
* mentor colleagues on ai/ml concepts, tools, and development practices; create documentation and training materials
* participate in code reviews, architecture discussions, and agile development ceremonies
* perform other duties as required.


minimum requirements:
* bachelor’s degree in software engineering, data science, information technology or equivalent work experience
* azure ai engineer associate, machine learning specialty, or equivalent cloud ai certifications preferred
* 5\-7 years of software development experience, with a current focus on ai/ml development or integration
* experience with llm apis (openai, azure openai, anthropic, or similar) and prompt engineering techniques
* experience with cloud platforms (azure \& gcp preferred) including compute, storage, and ai services
* proficiency with databases and experience with modern data warehousing solutions
* experience with microsoft power platform, dynamics 365, or dataverse
* experience with containerization (docker) and orchestration (kubernetes)
* experience with iot data, building automation systems, or smart building technologies
* experience with git version control and agile development methodologies
* knowledge of construction, facilities management, or building services industry
* strong communication skills with the ability to explain complex ai concepts to technical and non\-technical audiences
* entrepreneurial mindset with ability to identify and pursue high\-value ai opportunities
* proficiency in p ai/ml development, including ai driven ci/cd and agile frameworks
* strong full\-stack development skills in numerous languages, and modern web frameworks

title: Senior AI DevOps Engineer
description:
overview:

we are in search of a seasoned senior ai developer with a specialization in azure ai studio, azure open ai, microsoft copilots, ai and ml methodologies, and aws bedrock. in this role, you will be the guiding force behind our ai initiatives, providing expertise and leadership to all users across the organization who have ai use cases. your focus will be on architecting, developing, and implementing advanced ai solutions while ensuring alignment with best practices and business objectives.
responsibilities:
* develop and maintain our ai platform using azure ai studio and aws bedrock.
* implement and optimize ai algorithms and models.
* collaborate with cross\-functional teams to understand business requirements and design effective ai solutions.
* integrate ai technologies, such as cognitive services, into our platform.
* stay up to date with the latest advancements in ai and ml and propose innovative solutions.
* ensure the scalability, reliability, and performance of the ai platform.
* collaborate with cross\-functional teams to gather and analyze requirements for ai and software development projects.
* design, develop, and maintain ai\-powered applications, ensuring adherence to coding standards and best practices.
* utilize power apps, power automate, ai builder, and azure ai studio to create innovative and efficient solutions.  

coordinate development, testing, and deployment activities for assigned ai solutions and enhancements.
* develop and maintain apis, integrations, and connectors to enhance system functionalities. perform and review all the devops activity in different cloud platforms, azure, aws, oci and gcp.
* support implementation of governance, data sensitivity, security, and operational requirements based on established policies.
* conduct thorough testing, debugging, and performance optimization to ensure quality and reliability.
* troubleshoot and resolve issues, performing root cause analysis when necessary.
* track progress, risks, dependencies, and delivery timelines; escalate issues as needed.
* ensure adherence to engineering best practices including code quality, testing, documentation, and ci/cd usage.
* collaborate with team members and provide technical guidance, mentorship, and support.
* stay up to date with industry trends and advancements in ai, automation, and cloud technologies.
* ensure timely completion of assigned projects and deliverables.
* complete all responsibilities as outlined in the annual performance review and/or goal setting.
* complete all special projects and other duties as assigned.
* must be able to perform duties with or without reasonable accommodation.

  

this job description is intended to describe the general nature and level of work being performed and is not to be construed as an exhaustive list of responsibilities, duties and skills required. this job description does not constitute an employment agreement and is subject to change as the needs of cotiviti and requirements of the job change.


qualifications:
* bachelor's or master's degree in computer science, engineering, or a related field.
* minimum of 7 years of experience in ai and ml development.
* proficiency in azure ai studio, cognitive services, azure, aws, aws bedrock, and sage maker.
* strong programming skills in languages such as python, java, or c\+\+.
* experience with data preprocessing, feature engineering, and model evaluation.
* familiarity with deep learning frameworks like tensorflow or pytorch.
* experience with rag (retrieve, analyze, generate) models is a plus.
* familiarity with developing custom ai models and algorithms.
* knowledge of llama (language learning and multilingual applications) custom development is highly desired.
* experience with natural language processing (nlp) and text analytics.
* understanding of cloud\-based ai services and platforms.
* strong understanding of machine learning techniques and frameworks.
* proven track record of successfully delivering ai projects.
* knowledge of data engineering and data visualization techniques.
* familiarity with devops practices for ai/ml deployments.

**cognitive/mental requirements:*** strong problem\-solving and analytical skills.
* excellent communication and teamwork abilities.
* ability to design and implement scalable and efficient ai solutions.
* ability to work independently and collaborate effectively with team members.
**working conditions and physical requirements:**

* remaining in a stationary position, often standing or sitting for prolonged periods.
* communicating with others to exchange information.
* repeating motions that may include the wrists, hands, and/or fingers.
* assessing accuracy, neatness, and thoroughness of work.
* must be able to provide a dedicated, secure work area.
* must be able to provide high\-speed internet access/connectivity and office setup and maintenance.
* no adverse environmental conditions are expected.

*base compensation ranges from $130,000 to $156,000 per year. specific offers are determined by various factors, such as experience, education, skills, certifications, and other business needs.* *cotiviti offers team members a competitive benefits package to address a wide range of personal and family needs, including medical, dental, vision, disability, and life insurance coverage, 401(k) savings plans, paid family leave, 9 paid holidays per year, and 17\-27 days of paid time off (pto) per year, depending on specific level and length of service with cotiviti. for information about our benefits package, please refer to our* *careers page.*
